title: External Database Integration (Mirroring)
description: Mirror an Azure SQL Database or Databricks catalog into Fabric OneLake for near-real-time analytics without moving data.
prerequisites: Azure SQL Database or Databricks workspace (existing)

azureParams.name: source_type
azureParams.label: Source Type
azureParams.description: The external database type to mirror.

azureParams.name: connection_string
azureParams.label: Connection String / Server
azureParams.description: Server name (Azure SQL) or workspace URL (Databricks).
